choose.when: /* 등록된 데이터가 있는 경우 */ select a.insp_ord, a.inspcd, b.CDNM as insp_nm, a.bigo, a.cmpycd, a.itemcd, a.insp_gb from pd_insp_item_std a left outer join HPBA900T_TBL b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.inspcd = b.CODE and b.CDGBN = '830' and b.REMARK = 'kor' where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.itemcd = #{itemcd} and a.insp_gb = #{insp_gb} order by a.insp_ord
choose.otherwise: /* 등록된 데이터가 없는 경우 초기값(공통코드) 조회 */ select '' as insp_ord, CODE as inspcd, CDNM as insp_nm, '' as bigo, #{cmpycd} as cmpycd, #{itemcd} as itemcd, #{insp_gb} as insp_gb from HPBA900T_TBL where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and CDGBN = '830' and REMARK = 'kor' and useyn = 'y' order by CODE
